a.style: font-family:'Playfair Display', Georgia, 'Times New Roman', 'Liberation Serif', serif

text.tspan: Country position on the Partial Nuclear-Test-Ban Treaty, 2023
The treaty's objective is to stop nuclear weapons tests in the atmosphere, in outer space, and under water. A

country's position on a treaty can be
"Not signed"
,
"Signed"
, or
"Approved"
.
Data source: United Nations Office for Disarmament Affairs (2024)
